title: Bergen Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Bergen, with a Z-Score of -3.23. This is a critical weather event with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are extreme, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of humidity, at 83%, and moderate winds of 11.9 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 12.3 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling.
